description: Top portion of a court record from the court of Avraham Maimonides (r. 1205-1237), who held the title Nagid after 1213 CE, specifically (l. 4). Witnessed on Tuesday the 16th of the month of Adar in Fustat. On Avraham Maimonides, see S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2: 39-40 and 5:476-77; on cases brought before his court see Mediterranean Society, 1:88, 255, 366, 491; 2:397; 3:72.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בJRL.
